result: I would dissolve the illusion of separation—the core belief that we are fundamentally divided from each other, from other living beings, and from the planet itself. From that single shift, empathy would become instinctive, exploitation would feel as unnatural as harming one’s own body, and our collective choices would naturally align with regeneration over extraction. It’s the keystone delusion that, if removed, could unlock cascading healing across every crisis we face.
